svg.title: Agentic SDLC with phase planning, brownfield mode, and DevOps
svg.desc: A Phase Planner and validator first split a large requirement into independently shippable phases; Lifecycle showing planning phase with paired creator and validator agents above a spec freeze line, then parallel .NET and React tracks for development and testing, merging into a DevOps Engineer and Reviewer loop that produces a runnable application. Cross-track bug back-edges route failures from the DevOps phase to the relevant track's engineer. At the technical-spec review, the user can also route a requirements change back to the Business Analyst, re-running the full planning chain.
svg.text: Loop until phases are complete and shippable
Loop until req spec is complete and accurate
Req spec is the source of truth
Loop until tech spec traces to req spec
Loop until stories cover tech spec
Spec freeze — point of no return
Loop until app builds, boots, tests pass
Brownfield mode — existing codebase (alternative entry at /start-run)
